privileged_info_summary: The vendor_fuzzy_cleanup task uses synthetic data with 5 fictional vendors: TechSource Solutions (2500), Global Logistics Inc (2500), Apex Office Supplies (1000), BrightStar Energy (2000), and Omega Marketing Group (4000), totaling 12000 in spend. The task explicitly verifies that Omega Marketing Group's total spend should be 4000 when correctly mapped using fuzzy merge. Expected output files are consolidated_spend.csv and Vendor_Spend_Analysis.pbix on the Desktop. The actual invoices_messy.csv and vendor_master.csv data files do not exist in the repository and would need to be generated by task setup scripts (which are also not present).
